title: Station 2 – Ex 8: Now I'm 12 (Modal Verbs: Past und Present Perfect)
description: Modalverb-Ersatzformen im Simple Past und Present Perfect. Mehrere Formate werden akzeptiert – trenne Varianten mit Komma (z.B. 'wasn't able to, wasn't allowed to').

items.question: Now Dave can have a phone. When he was six, he ___ have a phone. (konnte/durfte nicht)
Now Dave can make films on his computer. When he was six, he ___ make films. (konnte nicht)
Now Dave can find information online. When he was six, he ___ find information online. (konnte nicht)
Now Dave can use his dad's tablet. When he was six, he ___ use his dad's tablet. (durfte nicht)
Now Dave writes texts on the computer. When he was six, he ___ write with a pen. (musste)
Dave ___ had to do a lot of homework today. (Present Perfect Hilfsverb)
Dave has ___ to do a lot of homework. (Present Perfect von 'have to' – Partizip)
That's why he hasn't called Jay ___. (noch nicht)
Mr Preston ___ been able to fix his tablet. (Present Perfect negativ)
Mr Preston hasn't been ___ to fix his tablet. (können – Partizip)
It's still ___. (kaputt)
Dave ___ been allowed to go online all day. (Present Perfect negativ)
Dave hasn't been ___ to go online all day. (dürfen – Partizip)
He's angry ___ his parents. (Präposition)
Present Perfect von 'have to' (he) → he ___ had to...
Present Perfect negativ von 'be able to' (he) → he ___ been able to...
Present Perfect negativ von 'be allowed to' (he) → he ___ been allowed to...
Technology has ___. (sich verändert – Present Perfect)
Dave ___ films on his computer when he was six. (make – Simple Past negativ)
Remember that technology has ___ too. (sich verändert)
